what_it_does: Records an image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking attachment id att-984c5172 to the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Furniture.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no prose body.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
standouts: The target points to a specific icon asset named Icon_Gold_Furniture.
It is an images attachment in the design-assets channel.
It is a minimal metadata-only ledger record.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Attachment id uses an att- prefix.
References an image asset with an image:// URI scheme.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone.
notes: A metadata stub that registers an image attachment for a furniture icon in the design-assets channel.
questions: What message or conversation context is this attachment associated with?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment ledger entry and it records an image attachment as intended.
intention_signals: To create a durable, queryable record of a design-assets image attachment so the icon asset can be located and referenced later.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment record and a specific image asset, enabling retrieval of the icon by attachment id or channel context.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry for the design-assets channel that records an images attachment with id att-984c5172 targeting image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Furniture, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference to the Icon_Gold_Furniture image asset shared as an attachment in the design-assets channel.
